title: Character classes in regular expressions should not contain the same character twice
description: Avoid using character classes in regular expressions that contain the same character twice because it can lead to unexpected matching results.
recommendation: Use unique characters in character classes.

noncompliant.description: Duplicate character 'A' in the character class.

compliant.description: Unique characters in the character class.

why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicate characters in character classes can lead to unintended matches.
how_to_fix: Use unique characters in character classes.
